feat.name: True Perception
feat.text: Your perceptive abilities and ability to process sensory information are so far beyond the pale that you notice minute discrepancies in all sorts of illusions and physical transformations. You are constantly under the effects of a 6th rank *truesight spell*, using your Perception modifier for the counteract check.

traits.name: General
traits.text: A type of feat that any character can select, regardless of ancestry and class, as long as they meet the prerequisites. You can select a feat with this trait when your class grants a general feat.

traits.name: Revelation
traits.text: Effects with this trait see things as they truly are.
